name_en: Posto de Turismo de Ponta Delgada
name_local: Posto de Turismo de Ponta Delgada

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Azores relief map is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o mapa em relevo dos Açores?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW MAH-puh AYNG reh-LEH-voo DOOSH uh-SOH-rihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The relief map is a permanent exhibit used for route planning and geography reference.

likely_response.translation_en: The map is at the counter.

responses.english: The map is at the counter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get the official stamp
phrases.text_local: Onde obtenho o carimbo oficial de Ponta Delgada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih awb-TEH-nyoo AW kuh-REEM-boo aw-fee-SEEAHL DIH POHNG-tuh dihl-GAH-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: Collecting official municipal stamps is a popular tradition among visitors to the Azores.

likely_response.local: No posto de turismo da cidade.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo DUH see-DAH-dih.

responses.phonetic: NOO POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo DUH see-DAH-dih.
responses.local: No posto de turismo da cidade.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get the official stamp
phrases.text_local: Onde posso obter o carimbo oficial?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo awb-TEHR AW kuh-REEM-boo aw-fee-SEEAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Collecting official stamps is a common activity for visitors.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, ask at the counter.

responses.english: Good morning, ask at the counter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Azores relief map is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o mapa dos Açores em relevo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW MAH-puh DOOSH uh-SOH-rihsh AYNG reh-LEH-voo?
phrases.cultural_note: The relief map is a popular feature for orientation.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está no interior do posto.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NOO een-tih-REEOHR DOO POHSH-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's inside the office.

responses.english: Good morning, it's inside the office.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NOO een-tih-REEOHR DOO POHSH-too.
responses.local: Bom dia, está no interior do posto.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket machine is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a máquina de senhas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH MAH-kee-nuh DIH SEH-nyuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Visitors must take a numbered ticket before approaching any service counter.
